name: synthengine
description: AI-first 3D game engine. Headless, custom OpenGL, built for AI agents (Claude Code, Codex, etc.). Scan assets and build any genre: FPS, racing, RPG, horror, platformer.

plugins.name: synthengine
plugins.description: AI-first headless 3D game engine skill. Scan raw assets, run a 6-agent pipeline, and produce a playable game for any genre.
